messages.content:
Question: During 2018, how many businesses that received reviews offered either business parking or bike parking?

Available databases: yelp_db, user_database

Available schema:
Database: yelp_db (mongodb)
Database: user_database (duckdb)
  Table: review — review_id, user_id, business_ref, rating, useful, funny, cool, text, date
  Table: tip — user_id, business_ref, text, date, compliment_count
  Table: user — user_id, name, review_count, yelping_since, useful, funny, cool, elite

function.name: query_db
function.arguments: {"database": "user_database", "query": "SELECT DISTINCT business_ref FROM review WHERE date LIKE '2018-%'", "query_type": "sql"}

messages.name: query_db
